name: agent-guard
description: Local-by-default, no-telemetry guardrails that inspect supported agent tool calls and changed files to prevent secret leaks.

plugins.name: agent-guard
plugins.description: Local-by-default, no-telemetry hooks inspect supported tool inputs, outputs, and changed files in every enabled Claude Code or Codex session to block or mask secret leaks. Includes opt-in PII filtering and Git/CI backstops.
